name: NPTEL
publisher: MHRD / IITs & IISc, Government of India
notes: NPTEL lectures and course materials are released under Creative Commons BY-SA 4.0 unless otherwise noted on the individual course page.

name: MIT OpenCourseWare
notes: Most OCW materials are released under CC BY-NC-SA 4.0. A handful of courses use different terms — verify per course before redistribution.

name: OpenStax
notes: OpenStax textbooks are peer-reviewed, openly licensed under CC BY 4.0.

name: LibreTexts
notes: License varies per book; most are CC BY-NC-SA 4.0. Always check the footer of the specific chapter.

name: Official GATE Papers (IIT)
notes: Previous-year GATE question papers and official answer keys are released for free by the organising IIT. Only link to the official host; do not mirror.

name: arXiv
notes: License varies per submission (CC0, CC BY, CC BY-SA, CC BY-NC-SA, or arXiv perpetual). Verify the license tag on each paper.

name: NASA Technical Reports Server
publisher: U.S. National Aeronautics and Space Administration
notes: U.S. Federal government works are in the public domain in the United States.

name: National Digital Library of India
notes: Aggregates openly-licensed and publicly-funded content. Each item carries its own license — surface the specific license when linking.

name: Shodhganga @ INFLIBNET
notes: Indian PhD theses released by the awarding university on open access terms.
